guidance: 400MW TopCon line by end-Aug 2026 lifting module capacity to 1.2GW.
insights: H2 FY26 income ₹405.8cr (+46.6%); PAT ₹29.3cr; near debt-free, net worth ₹164cr.
Commissioned new TopCon line; total module capacity now 800MW.
Solar water pumps gaining traction; guided ~35-40% of expected FY27 revenue.
concall.source: APS H2 FY26 earnings call (GuruFocus call highlights) + H2/FY26 results release, ~27-May-2026

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
